description: EnvZ-OmpR in KEGG style: two-component system pathway and gene orthologs (eco) including ompF, ompC, micF.
name: EnvZ-OmpR (KEGG-sourced)
notes: V5 = KEGG only. Two-component signaling; OmpR targets ompF, ompC, micF from KEGG.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ENVZ[eco:b2263 envZ]
    OMPR[eco:b2262 ompR]
    OMPF[eco:b0929 ompF]
    OMPC[eco:b2218 ompC]
    MICF[eco:b2982 micF]
    ENVZ -->|phosphorylates| OMPR
    OMPR -->|regulates| OMPF
    OMPR -->|regulates| OMPC
    OMPR -->|represses| MICF
    MICF -->|antisense| OMPF
    style ENVZ fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPR fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style OMPC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style MICF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: KEGG two-component pathway and E. coli genes; micF from KEGG regulatory RNA.
